life_history: Jay is a PhD student in a science field who has a strong passion for music, having previously led a college band and currently participating in a jazz group. Recently, he was offered a leadership position in the jazz group but declined due to concerns about managing the added responsibilities alongside his mental health struggles and academic workload. Jay feels disconnected from his colleagues in the scientific community, attributing this to differing values and work habits. He recalls a time when he felt connected and appreciated, a sentiment that is now absent in his current environment.
core_belief_description: Helpless: I am incompetent. I am helpless. I am a failure, loser.
intermediate_beliefs: If I am not able to excel in everything I do, then I am failing.
I need to be recognized and appreciated by others to feel successful.
intermediate_beliefs_during_depression: When I'm not engaged in music or my work in a meaningful way, or when I'm not recognized for my efforts, I feel useless and like a failure. I believe my contributions are not valuable.
coping_strategies: Avoiding responsibilities and opportunities that may lead to additional stress.

cognitive_models.situation: Getting stuck during jazz rehearsals with other performers and needing to repeat many times.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: I don't belong in a jazz improvisation context, my skills are not good enough, I'm still stuck here after many tries—I'm just not good at this. I'm holding the group back.
cognitive_models.behavior: Avoids practicing and fully committing to music, expresses doubt about his abilities.

cognitive_models.situation: Being offered a leadership position in the jazz group, although he wanted it, but felt unsure about being able to manage the responsibilities on top of everything.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: I just cannot make it. I cannot make any advancement in music. I'm not even brave enough to take the challenge. I am a shameful failure. I would be too stressed and unable to manage.
cognitive_models.emotion: anxious, worried, disappointed, ashamed, embarrassed, humiliated
